name: Spaghetti, Black Eye Peas, and Artichoke Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the black-eyed peas according to basic directions.
2. Heat olive oil in a large saucepan and brown garlic pieces.
3. Add crushed red pepper, scallions, and artichoke hearts; sauté for 4 or 5 minutes.
4. Add black olives and enough reserved bean broth (about 2 to 2 1/2 cups) to the pan.
5. Season with salt and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the cooked black-eyed peas and chopped parsley.
8. Cook spaghetti until al dente, then drain and add to serving bowl.
9. Spoon half of the sauce and half of the Parmesan over the spaghetti.
10. Mix well.
11. Spoon remaining sauce and cheese over the spaghetti.
